data.title: 国际服「Get Set, Go! Kivotos Halo Festival!」活动预约
data.summary: Sensei, please come here and help us prepare for the Kivotos Halo Festival! You can pre-register now
data.body:
Sensei, please come here and help us prepare for the Kivotos Halo Festival!
You can pre-register now and play the game to earn "Sports Cards".

⬇️Go to Pre-registration⬇️
https://nexon.link/5qZ
